description_long: This object is a weathered, vertical pennant hanging from a wooden horizontal bar, supported by two wooden brackets. The pennant itself is made of a gray, tattered fabric, stained with dark red blotches resembling blood or rust, and features a bold, black abstract symbol or glyph in the center. The fabric is irregularly shaped, with a pointed lower end and visible creases and wear, suggesting exposure to the elements. The wooden bar and brackets are rough-hewn, with visible grain and additional reddish stains, giving the entire piece a rugged, distressed appearance. The mounting structure is simple, with the fabric draped and possibly tied or looped over the bar. This pennant would likely be used as a marker, banner, or sign in a gritty urban or post-apocalyptic setting.
description: A distressed gray fabric pennant with a black abstract symbol, stained with red blotches, hangs from a rough wooden bar and brackets. The pennant is tattered and weathered, giving it a rugged, worn appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full gray pennant with black symbol and red stains, hanging from a wooden bar and brackets.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the wooden bar and brackets, with the pennant fabric hanging down and little of the symbol visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the pennant, showing the back of the fabric and mounting bar, with less detail on the symbol but visible stains and wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the wooden structure and the hanging fabric.
attribute_graphic_design: The pennant features a large, black abstract symbol or glyph centered on a gray, stained background. The design is bold and simple, with no text or intricate patterns.
